ext.description: Auto Accept Agent (Custom): Run-only mode with configurable overlay. Modified version.
config.cdpPort.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol port. Set to null to auto-detect from parent process --remote-debugging-port. If detection fails, ports 8997-9003 will be scanned.
config.localVipOverride.description: Force local VIP mode (for testing). Skips online license verification when enabled.
config.languageOverride.description: Override language setting (for testing). Requires restart.
config.autoAcceptFileEdits.description: Automatically accept file edits ('Accept All' button). Disable to manually review code changes.
config.overlayMode.description: Background mode overlay display: 'none' = disabled, 'panel' = side panel only, 'minimal' = small bottom indicator.
